originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Benchmarking Intel i9-14900K vs AMD Ryzen 9 9950X for Reinforcement Learning Workloads
summary: Benchmarked Intel i9-14900K and AMD Ryzen 9 9950X processors to evaluate performance for reinforcement learning workloads. Investigated performance regressions, compared synthetic benchmarks and real RL tasks, and identified WSL overhead as a potential issue. Decided to dual-boot Linux on the AMD machine for further testing.
